description: Summary of the application cleanup execution

inspected.description: The total number of application descriptors inspected for cleanup

cleaned.description: The number of application descriptors removed successfully

skipped.description: The number of application descriptors skipped because they are still installed

failed.description: The number of application descriptors that could not be removed due to errors

cleanedIds.description: The identifiers of application descriptors removed successfully

skippedIds.description: The identifiers of application descriptors skipped because they are still installed

failedIds.description: The identifiers of application descriptors that failed cleanup
